title: Fts3 offsets() function may report SQLITE_CORRUPT with empty string.
bug_features_seed: CREATE FULLTEXT INDEX idx_content ON test_fts(content);
SELECT MATCH(content, 'Hello') AS match_result FROM test_fts;
SELECT MATCH(content, NULL) AS match_result FROM test_fts;
key_bug_features: Fts3 offsets() function with empty string
